hero.subtitle: Unified infrastructure and API routing for global digital entertainment. Reach 40M+ users through local payment networks.

metrics.m1Desc: Young & digital-first demographic ready to spend.
metrics.m2Desc: Rapidly expanding gaming community in the region.
metrics.m3Desc: UZCARD & HUMO — unsupported by global gateways.

solutions.title: Seamless Solutions
solutions.apiDesc: Real-time server-to-server balance funding directly via local e-wallets and cash networks.
solutions.sdkDesc: Storefront integration allowing users to purchase content via local payment methods with automated USD/EUR settlement.

features.f1Desc: Connect to 100% of the paying audience in Uzbekistan with a single integration. We provide direct access to the most popular payment methods, ensuring you never miss a sale due to checkout friction.
features.f2Desc: Eliminate currency risk and receive your funds faster. Our infrastructure automatically handles local currency conversion, settling your balance in USD or EUR seamlessly.
features.f3Desc: An API-first platform architected to handle massive transaction volumes from game launches or viral events without breaking a sweat. Seamlessly plug into the ecosystem.
features.f4Desc: Focus on growing your game while we handle local financial regulations, tax compliance, and robust fraud prevention across all your transactions.

contact.title: Ready to scale your presence?
contact.subtitle: Get directly in touch with our partnerships team to launch your game in Central Asia.
